summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “My family”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我的家》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
上午我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃苹果，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去学校。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢苹果。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My family”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My family”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early.

paragraphTranslations.en: My name is Xiao Ming.
The topic I want to discuss today is “My family”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
In the morning, I get up at seven.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom and Dad are both at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat apples and also drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go to school.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes apples.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Good morning”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《早上好》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，姐姐也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面包，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去商店。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢茶。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Good morning”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat bread and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the store. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes tea. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Buying apples”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《买苹果》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，老师也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我喝水，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去公园。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢水。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Buying apples”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and teacher is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I drink water and tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the park. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes water. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “What day is today?”
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《今天星期几？》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，朋友也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃菜，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去北京。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢菜。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “What day is today?” Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “What day is today?” Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot.

paragraphTranslations.en: My name is Xiao Ming.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 今天我想谈谈《今天星期几？》。
paragraphTranslations.en: The topic I want to discuss today is “What day is today?”
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom is at home, and friend is also at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat vegetable and also drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go to Beijing.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes vegetable.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “I'm a Chinese student”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我是中国学生》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，同学也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去朋友家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢面条。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “I'm a Chinese student”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now?

I say, “I’m very happy.”

paragraphTranslations.zh: 吃完饭以后，我去朋友家。
paragraphTranslations.en: After eating, I go to a friend's home.

We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。

I say, “Hello, teacher.”

I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes noodles.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Drink more water”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《多喝水》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
上午我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃米饭，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我回家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢米饭。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Drink more water”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat rice and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “My little cat”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我的小猫》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃苹果，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去学校。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢苹果。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My little cat”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

paragraphTranslations.en: The topic I want to discuss today is “My little cat”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom and Dad are both at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat apples and also drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go to school.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes apples.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Going to Beijing”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat bread and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the store. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes tea. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water.

paragraphTranslations.en: My name is Xiao Ming.
The topic I want to discuss today is “Going to Beijing”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat bread and drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go to the store.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes tea.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “My Morning”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我的早上》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，老师也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我喝水，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去公园。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢水。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My Morning”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and teacher is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I drink water and tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the park. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes water. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “My Family”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我的家人》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，朋友也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃菜，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去北京。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢菜。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My Family”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My Family”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table.

translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “A Day Going to School”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 今天我想谈谈《去学校的一天》。
paragraphTranslations.en: The topic I want to discuss today is “A Day Going to School”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
In the morning, I get up at seven.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat noodles and drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”

paragraphTranslations.zh: 吃完饭以后，我去朋友家。
paragraphTranslations.en: After eating, I go to a friend's home.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes noodles.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “My Small Room”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我的小房间》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃米饭，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我回家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢米饭。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My Small Room”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat rice and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.”

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Today Is Hot”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《今天很热》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃苹果，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去学校。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢苹果。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Today Is Hot”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.”
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Today Is Hot”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.”

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Drinking Water with a Friend”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我和朋友喝水》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，姐姐也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面包，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去商店。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢茶。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Drinking Water with a Friend”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat bread and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the store. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes tea. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”

My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.

The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Buying Things at a Store”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《在商店买东西》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，老师也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我喝水，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去公园。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢水。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Buying Things at a Store”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and teacher is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I drink water and tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the park. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes water. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question.

The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “I Like Rice”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我喜欢米饭》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
上午我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，朋友也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃菜，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去北京。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢菜。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “I Like Rice”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “I Like Rice”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “A Busy Monday”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《一个忙的星期一》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，同学也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去朋友家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢面条。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “A Busy Monday”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “A Busy Monday”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly.

paragraphTranslations.en: My name is Xiao Ming.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 今天我想谈谈《一个忙的星期一》。
paragraphTranslations.en: The topic I want to discuss today is “A Busy Monday”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat noodles and drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”

paragraphTranslations.zh: 吃完饭以后，我去朋友家。
paragraphTranslations.en: After eating, I go to a friend's home.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes noodles.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.

This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 今天我想谈谈《早上八点》。
paragraphTranslations.en: The topic I want to discuss today is “Eight in the Morning”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom and Dad are both at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat rice and also drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go home.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes rice.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.

The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
