summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “My Chinese Teacher”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我的中国老师》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃苹果，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去学校。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢苹果。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My Chinese Teacher”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “I Want to Drink Tea”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我想喝茶》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，姐姐也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面包，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去商店。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢茶。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “I Want to Drink Tea”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat bread and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the store. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes tea. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better.

First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat bread and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the store. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes tea. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better.

But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.

Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Going to a Friend’s Home”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《去朋友家》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，朋友也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃菜，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去北京。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢菜。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Going to a Friend’s Home”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Eating at School”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我们在学校吃饭》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，同学也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去朋友家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢面条。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Eating at School”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Eating at School”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather.

I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes noodles.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Today Is Not Too Cold”.

今天星期一。

早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃米饭，也喝茶。

我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我回家。
路上有很多人。

他也去学校。

学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。

朋友喜欢米饭。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Today Is Not Too Cold”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat rice and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Today Is Not Too Cold”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat rice and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot.

paragraphTranslations.en: My name is Xiao Ming.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 今天我想谈谈《今天不太冷》。
paragraphTranslations.en: The topic I want to discuss today is “Today Is Not Too Cold”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom and Dad are both at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat rice and also drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go home.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes rice.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “My Cat and Dog”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我的猫和狗》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃苹果，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去学校。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢苹果。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My Cat and Dog”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now?

comprehensionQuestions.questionEn: What is the main topic of this reading?
comprehensionQuestions.answerEn: It mainly discusses my cat and dog.
comprehensionQuestions.explanationEn: The title and repeated details point to the central topic.

comprehensionQuestions.questionEn: What is the writer's final thought?
comprehensionQuestions.answerEn: I ask Mom: What time is it now?
comprehensionQuestions.explanationEn: The final sentence usually gives the conclusion or reflection.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Reading and Writing”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《看书和写字》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
上午我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，姐姐也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面包，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去商店。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢茶。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Reading and Writing”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat bread and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the store. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes tea. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Reading and Writing”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat bread and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the store. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes tea. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”

Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

titleEn: I Can Speak a Little Chinese
summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “I Can Speak a Little Chinese”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我会说一点中文》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，老师也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我喝水，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去公园。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢水。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “I Can Speak a Little Chinese”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and teacher is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I drink water and tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the park. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes water. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes water. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. paragraphTranslations.zh: 今天我想谈谈《我会说一点中文》。
paragraphTranslations.en: The topic I want to discuss today is “I Can Speak a Little Chinese”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom is at home, and teacher is also at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I drink water and tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go to the park.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes water.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Watching a Movie Together”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我们一起看电影》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。

路上有很多人。

他也去学校。

我也喜欢。

九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。

可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。

First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.”

At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes vegetable.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “A Ten-Yuan Lunch”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《十块钱的午饭》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，同学也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去朋友家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢面条。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “A Ten-Yuan Lunch”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “A Ten-Yuan Lunch”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Sunday at Home”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《星期天在家》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃米饭，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我回家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢米饭。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Sunday at Home”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat rice and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table.

Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat rice and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 今天我想谈谈《星期天在家》。
paragraphTranslations.en: The topic I want to discuss today is “Sunday at Home”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom and Dad are both at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat rice and also drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go home.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes rice.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.

The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup.

titleEn: The Teacher Asks Me a Question
summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “The Teacher Asks Me a Question”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《老师问我问题》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，姐姐也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面包，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去商店。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢茶。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “The Teacher Asks Me a Question”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and older sister is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat bread and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the store. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes tea. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.”

titleEn: Going to the Hospital to See Mom
summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Going to the Hospital to See Mom”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我去医院看妈妈》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，老师也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我喝水，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去公园。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢水。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Going to the Hospital to See Mom”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and teacher is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I drink water and tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the park. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes water. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.”
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Going to the Hospital to See Mom”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and teacher is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I drink water and tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to the park. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes water. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.”

我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “A Cup of Hot Water”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and friend is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat vegetable and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to Beijing. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes vegetable. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese.

The weather is very good.

First I drink a cup of water.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？

paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.

I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Twenty People in Our Class”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我们班有二十个人》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，同学也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃面，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去朋友家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢面条。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Twenty People in Our Class”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom is at home, and classmate is also at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat noodles and drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to a friend's home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes noodles. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “My New Classmate”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《我的新同学》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
上午我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃米饭，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我回家。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢米饭。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
我觉得中文很有意思。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My New Classmate”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat rice and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question.
translationEn: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “My New Classmate”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. In the morning, I get up at seven. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat rice and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go home. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes rice. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. I think Chinese is very interesting. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question.

The weather is very good.
In the morning, I get up at seven.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom and Dad are both at home.

I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go home.

We walk together.
The school is not far.

The teacher says, “Good morning.”

I wrote three characters.

I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes rice.
I like it too.

In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.

summaryEn: An HSK 1 reading titled “Buying Fruit”.
textZh:
我叫小明。
今天我想谈谈《买水果》。
今天星期一。
天气很好。
早上我七点起床。
我先喝一杯水。
妈妈在家，爸爸也在家。
我们一起吃早饭。
我吃苹果，也喝茶。
妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
我说：我很高兴。
吃完饭以后，我去学校。
路上有很多人。
我看见一个学生。
他也去学校。
我们一起走。
学校不远。
学校里有老师，也有学生。
老师说：早上好。
我说：老师好。
今天的课不难。
我会读，也会写。
我写了三个字。
老师说我写得好。
我很高兴。
中午我和朋友吃饭。
朋友喜欢苹果。
我也喜欢。
我们一共花了十块钱。
下午我回家。
爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
我说：很好。
晚上我们看电视。
电视里有很多人。
姐姐问我一个问题。
我想了想，然后回答。
她说：你很不错。
我笑了。
九点以后，我洗澡。
我看一本书。
书不长，但是很好。
十点我睡觉。
这一天很普通。
可是我很喜欢这一天。
我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
明天我还想这样学习。
有时候中文不容易。
可是我每天学一点。
这样我会越来越好。
第二天，我也早起。
我先看天气。
天气不冷，也不热。
我穿好衣服。
我问妈妈：现在几点？
妈妈说：七点半。
我说：我知道了。
我拿书，也拿水。
书在桌子上。
水在杯子里。
我和爸爸说再见。
爸爸说：好好学习。
我说：好的。
今天我想多说中文。
我问朋友一个问题。
朋友回答得很快。
我觉得中文很有意思。
translation: My name is Xiao Ming. The topic I want to discuss today is “Buying Fruit”. Today is Monday. The weather is very good. I get up at seven in the morning. First I drink a cup of water. Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting.

Mom and Dad are both at home. We eat breakfast together. I eat apples and also drink tea. Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?” I say, “I’m very happy.” After eating, I go to school. There are many people on the road. I see a student. He is also going to school. We walk together. The school is not far. There are teachers and students at school. The teacher says, “Good morning.” I say, “Hello, teacher.” Today's class is not difficult. I can read and write. I wrote three characters. The teacher says I wrote well. I am very happy. At noon, I eat with a friend. My friend likes apples. I like it too. We spent ten yuan in total. In the afternoon, I go home. Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?” I say, “It was very good.” In the evening, we watch TV. There are many people on TV. My older sister asks me a question. I thought for a moment and then answered. She says, “You’re doing very well.” I smiled. After nine, I take a shower. I read a book. The book is not long, but it is good. At ten, I sleep. This day is very ordinary. But I like this day very much. I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese. Tomorrow I still want to study like this. Sometimes Chinese is not easy. But I study a little every day. This way I will get better and better. The next day, I also get up early. First I check the weather. The weather is not cold and not hot. I put on my clothes. I ask Mom: What time is it now? Mom says, “Seven thirty.” I say, “I understand now.” I take my book and some water. The book is on the table. The water is in the cup. I say goodbye to Dad. Dad says, “Study hard.” I say, “Okay.” Today I want to speak more Chinese. I ask my friend a question. My friend answers very quickly. I think Chinese is very interesting.

paragraphTranslations.en: My name is Xiao Ming.
The topic I want to discuss today is “Buying Fruit”.
Today is Monday.
The weather is very good.
I get up at seven in the morning.
First I drink a cup of water.
Mom and Dad are both at home.
We eat breakfast together.
I eat apples and also drink tea.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 妈妈问我：你今天高兴吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Mom asks me, “Are you happy today?”
I say, “I’m very happy.”
After eating, I go to school.
There are many people on the road.
I see a student.
He is also going to school.
We walk together.
The school is not far.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 学校里有老师，也有学生。
paragraphTranslations.en: There are teachers and students at school.
The teacher says, “Good morning.”
I say, “Hello, teacher.”
Today's class is not difficult.
I can read and write.
I wrote three characters.
The teacher says I wrote well.
I am very happy.
At noon, I eat with a friend.
My friend likes apples.
I like it too.
We spent ten yuan in total.
In the afternoon, I go home.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 爸爸问我：今天过得好吗？
paragraphTranslations.en: Dad asks me, “Did you have a good day today?”
I say, “It was very good.”
In the evening, we watch TV.
There are many people on TV.
My older sister asks me a question.
I thought for a moment and then answered.
She says, “You’re doing very well.”
I smiled.
After nine, I take a shower.
I read a book.
The book is not long, but it is good.
At ten, I sleep.
This day is very ordinary.
But I like this day very much.

paragraphTranslations.zh: 我喜欢这一天，因为有家人、朋友，也有学习中文的时间。
paragraphTranslations.en: I like this day because I have family, friends, and time to study Chinese.
Tomorrow I still want to study like this.
Sometimes Chinese is not easy.
But I study a little every day.
This way I will get better and better.
The next day, I also get up early.
First I check the weather.
The weather is not cold and not hot.
I put on my clothes.
I ask Mom: What time is it now?
Mom says, “Seven thirty.”
I say, “I understand now.”
I take my book and some water.
The book is on the table.
The water is in the cup.
I say goodbye to Dad.
Dad says, “Study hard.”
I say, “Okay.”
Today I want to speak more Chinese.
I ask my friend a question.
My friend answers very quickly.
I think Chinese is very interesting.
